creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 212214
svn diff for irc/icbirc - fixes BROKEN, and slight changes

irc/icbirc has been marked BROKEN for unfetchable
benzedrine.cx has either been sold to someone else
or has other interests. As a result; all the source,
and projects they maintained are gone. :(
So I'll archive the source for this one. :)

This revision consists of

Makefile:
MASTER_SITES (changes)
BROKEN (removes)

pkg-descr:
WWW (changes)

hrs@ I'm not trying to take over, or anything. Just trying
to help out. :)


That's it, Thanks!

--Chris
